description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-rating` (T3-15) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-rating/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, value typed as number, max typed, readonly prop typed, precision (half-star) typed
2. Accessibility — `role="radiogroup"` with individual stars as `role="radio"`, keyboard: arrow keys select, value announced ("3 of 5 stars"), readonly mode uses `role="img"` with aria-label, axe-core pass
3. Tests — star selection, keyboard nav, half-star, readonly display, hx-change event, min/max constraints, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — interactive, readonly, half-star, all sizes
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, filled/empty star styling via CSS (not images), CSS parts (star, icon)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-rating/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-rating — T3-15 antagonistic quality review
